markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, refine processes, and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Prioritize non-technical articles (max 2/week) to unblock Blaxel's review bottleneck. A new "sandbox gateways" topic will be explored.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Process Refinements:** Blaxel will add GrowthX to its weekly feature updates Slack channel to ensure content is always current. GrowthX will simplify writing guidelines to improve readability.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Blog Enhancements:** Blaxel will build an MVP for a reusable, overwritable CTA system to drive traffic to key landing pages. The term "microVM" will be standardized to remove the dash.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [**Engagement Status:** Blaxel would renew based on the strong process and partnership, despite it being too early for results-based metrics. The calibration phase ends Feb 16.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** Blaxel's review process is a bottleneck, with initial reviews taking 20–30 mins/article.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow improves efficiency:](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
    1.  [GrowthX delivers articles via Slack notification.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
    2.  [Blaxel dispatches articles to an in-house writer (Vikram) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
    3.  [Nicolas consolidates feedback for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The Slack notification is critical, as the main table tool is difficult to navigate without filtering access.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

### Content Strategy & Topics

  - [**Article Mix:** Shift to a majority of non-technical articles to reduce review time.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Target:** Max 2 technical articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**New Topic Idea: Sandbox Gateways**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [**Angle:** Warn against using gateways, as they limit users to the "lowest common denominator" of features from underlying sandbox providers.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Keyword Research (Aida):** Low volume (20/mo) but high opportunity, as Google struggles to serve educational intent.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Content Ideas:** Blaxel will add all future ideas to the shared Notion page.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Writing Guidelines & Style

  - [**Feedback (from Vikram):**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [**Readability:** Articles use long sentences and complex words, making them hard to read.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Specificity:** Content is too generic; it needs more nuance specific to AI/ML.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Readability:** Will update guidelines for shorter, simpler sentences.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Specificity:** Will refine instructions to ensure AI-specific nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**Rationale:** LLMs prioritize content structure (H2s, H3s), allowing for flexibility in tone and style.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)

### Blog Enhancements & CTAs

  - [**Standardization: "microVM"**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [**Decision:** Remove the dash from "microVM" to align with common usage.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will update all relevant blog posts; Blaxel will update its docs and website.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**New Feature: Reusable CTAs**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive traffic to key landing pages (e.g., "Get Started," "Contact," "Sandboxes").](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Blaxel will build an MVP system with a default CTA that is overwritable per article.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Engagement Status & Renewal

  - [**Renewal Intent:** Blaxel would renew based on the strong process and partnership, even though it's too early for results-based metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [**Phase Timeline:** The calibration phase ends Feb 16, transitioning to a steady production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [**Publication Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**Default:** Articles publish once feedback is addressed, unless explicitly flagged for a second review.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** Blaxel will flag articles requiring a second review in the draft comments.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=2335.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Research "sandbox gateways" for a potential brief.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines for readability and AI-specific nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
      - [Update all relevant blog posts to use "microVM" (no dash).](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
      - [Tag Aida and Natalie for article reviews during Kathy's OOO.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Add GrowthX to the weekly feature updates Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [Send the historical feature update summary to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Update docs and website to use "microVM" (no dash).](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [Build an MVP for the reusable CTA system.](https://fathom.video/share/2k78b-78QTMutZ5W4jxyKL91_3xKjZm4?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
